historical_facts.claim: XRPL Known Amendments lists TokenEscrow as a protocol amendment surface.
historical_facts.quote_or_summary: TokenEscrow is a named amendment in the public known-amendments inventory.

historical_outcome.outcome_summary: Financial custody primitive requiring explicit review.

safe_route_label.label: HOLD_FOR_CHALLENGE
safe_route_label.notes: Token escrow changes custody/timing semantics for issued assets.

sources.summary: XRPL validators vote on amendments; more than 80% support must hold for two weeks, and servers without enabled amendment code become amendment-blocked.
XRPL's public known-amendments inventory, including status, default vote, amendment IDs, and descriptions.

technical_change: Extends escrow behavior beyond XRP into issued assets.
